---
title: "Privacy Law Roundup — May 01, 2026"
date: 2026-05-01 11:23:14 +0530
categories: [news, roundup]
tags: [dpdpa, india, privacy, global, news]
---

## India: DPDPA Implementation & Readiness

India's Digital Personal Data Protection Act (DPDPA) 2023, along with its 2025 rules, has officially come into force, prompting widespread discussions on its operational impacts across various sectors. Businesses, particularly startups and adtech platforms, are now actively assessing their readiness and grappling with the new compliance burdens. Technology providers like Netskope, iValue, and Varonis are launching India-specific solutions and partnerships to help enterprises navigate the DPDPA's requirements, which some analysts suggest leans towards a "data maximisation" regime.
